_comment: Candidate profile used for fit-scoring. Copy to profile.json and edit. This is the 'data' you swap to retarget the system; no engine code references a real name/email.
_dealbreakers_note: Conditions that DISQUALIFY a role (the fit-scorer rejects a posting if any apply).
dealbreakers: role has no analytics/data-engineering work (no SQL, dbt, or data warehouse)
